TextENGNew: "Nooooo!!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1439. ...Huh?!"
I woke up screaming... and the moment I did, the blanket laying up to my chest fell forward and rolled down to my knees.
At the same time, beads of sweat from my forehead dripped down on the thighs of my pajamas, leaving a number of stains.
"Haaah... haaah... haaah...!!"
I held down my throbbing chest to remedy my hoarse breathing.
My heart was pounding fast and beating hard. It really seemed like it was about to be crushed.
"Uuu... uaaahh...!"
I couldn't stop trembling.
Sweat was flowing through my whole body like a waterfall. My limbs were shaking loud enough to be audible, and the clattering of my back teeth was making a bizarre sound.
My hair was sticking to my forehead, my neck, and my cheeks, making me feel gross.
Slowly... after finally managing to catch my breath, I timidly lifted my head.
This is... my room.
Right, this is my room, in my house.
I slowly looked back at the alarm clock on the side of my desk.
...It was around 7 o'clock. The second hand continued moving like usual.
From out the window, I could hear... the cry of a sparrow.
Sunlight brightly shone in through the window with the curtains open wide... telling me it was morning.
I exhaled a deep sigh of relief, large enough to empty my lungs.
...As I gradually woke up and began to recognize the view in front of me was reality, I could feel all dark and heavy emotions fading from my heart.
...The despair, fear, and confusion slowly disappeared.
"Thank goodness... it was a dream...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1446. Phew..."
Thinking about it calmly... it was a strange dream.
After Mom's persistent nagging, I went into a frenzy grabbing a knife from the kitchen and swinging it over, and over, and over...
And then again, when Grandma witnessed it...
And of course, Dad came home right after that...
"...Ridiculous."
I shook my head and bitterly laughed at myself for being frightened by a dream.
Seriously, what an absurd dream. ...It was like that bad horror movie I saw on TV the other day.
No matter how much I argue and fight with Mom, I've never hated her enough to even think of turning a weapon on her.
Not to mention, killing Grandma and Dad, too? ...There's no way I'd ever do that.
It was so obviously unrealistic. It seemed like I took a story I saw somewhere else and replaced the characters with people I knew. It was an irresponsible nightmare.
"Haa...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1449. I'm sweaty and sticky..."
I looked at my pajamas. They were drenched with sweat like they'd been through rain.
This might have been the first time in my life I experienced a night sweat like this. The sheets were damp too. It was a little uncomfortable.
Mom will have to wash these sheets... And I'll have to dry off the bed...
I got off the bed, tossed the blanket to my desk, and yanked the sheet off.
There was a huge stain on top of the thin mattress, so I folded it into quarters, intending to wash it too.
"But I wonder if it'll dry by the end of the day...?"
Since we have a large washer, we can even wash futons. But whether or not it'll dry by the evening still depends on the weather.
...I thought that while walking towards the window, then opened it.
...A refreshing morning breeze blew in, the sun shining bright while hanging low in the sky.
I tilted my head back and looked up at the sky.
...There were only a few scattered clouds. It looked like today would be a nice day. So for now, I didn't need to worry about the laundry.
"...This feels nice."
The break of dawn had already passed, but... I think this was the first time in a long time that I woke up this early.
I'm always making preparations for tomorrow's classes late at night while listening to the radio, so I habitually stay in bed until the last minute in the morning.
Even so, I went to school on Monday morning feeling half asleep, but... for some reason, my head was clear today and I didn't feel sleepy at all.
Well, back in Hinamizawa, I woke up at this time without anyone waking me up, so it wasn't a big deal or anything...
"...Ah, that's right."
As soon as the word "Hinamizawa" came to mind, I finally remembered what happened last night.
I got into an argument with my family about visiting Hinamizawa, then I shut myself in my room... and fell asleep.
In the end, Mom opposed it without even giving me a chance to explain.
Grandma started saying weird things, and Dad acted like it was someone else's problem...
No one in my family made any attempt to help me...
(This... is my family?)
I suddenly let out a sigh of disappointment.
Up until now, I always loved my family.
My strict but reliable Mom.
My indecisive but friendly Dad.
My annoying but gentle Grandma.
When I was surrounded by them, I always felt loved.
But, that's not right.
I was like a doll, only allowed to act according to their whims.
The truth is... nobody cared about what I wanted.
They never actually saw my hard work.
My happiness never really mattered to them.
They're content only ever acting toward their own selfish ideals, and nothing more. ...Unforgivable.
And yet... when I started thinking about stepping outside that frame, they took notice.
Seems they didn't like that idea very much.
So, they opposed it and rejected my intentions.
They didn't even try to discuss it...
"Aha... ahaha..."
Somehow, I became overwhelmingly bitter and disheartened... and tears began spilling out.
Even though I've been working so hard.
Even though I've endured so much, while thinking about everyone else's happiness.
Yet as soon as I made a small decision of my own, all the things that were neatly piled up came tumbling down.
Even though I was just making a small request in order to help my beloved Akira-kun...
"...That's right, Akira-kun..."
I remembered what I had promised Akira-kun yesterday... and felt discouraged once more.
Under these circumstances, there's no way my parents will let me show him around.
Be that as it may, it would be awkward to introduce him to someone else just to show him around.
...In fact, it might be easier for the two of us to just go somewhere else.
"Right... that's right."
I half-forced myself to regain my composure, and raised my head.
I'll apologize to Akira-kun and suggest that we go somewhere else for his sketching.
He might feel suspicious... but I'm sure he'll understand if I explain it.
Yeah, let's do that. ...Then we'll search for another nice location and go there together.
I'm sure he'll be able to make a nice picture if we do that...
"...All right."
I gave myself a strong, wholehearted nod.
For now... I should hurry up and shake off this heavy feeling.
I'm sure Chisato-chan will be worried if I stay depressed like this, and Akira-kun too...
"Anyway,@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1459. ...Huh?"
I opened my door with the futon and sheets in hand, but as soon as I entered the hallway by the stairs...
That moment... I frowned at the bizarre air I was faced with.
What in the world... was this heavy air?
And... it smelled fishy... You could say it smelled like a beast.
Suddenly... my nightmare from a little while ago came back to my mind. I sternly shook it off and walked down the hallway.
I'm overthinking this.
My dream a little while ago was really shocking, so that's why my doubts are getting stronger.
That's right... it's impossible. Isn't it?
For my whole family to have been killed... and me being the sole survivor.
You'd think that if my whole family was murdered, I'd be no exception to that, wouldn't I?
I would've been killed in my sleep... like by being stabbed, or strangled, or something.
But... I'm still alive. If that's the case, isn't that proof that nothing happened? Wouldn't that be the case?
Also... even though I occasionally hear about these sorts of gruesome incidents on TV, they don't happen just anywhere at any time.
They happen to someone very unlucky... to families with no connection to me that live far away from this city.
So it couldn't happen around me.
It definitely couldn't happen...!
...Wait.
It definitely... feels like this scene happened in the past.
This eerie presence.
This strange stench.
And, some strange sound, coming from behind me...!
I quickly turned around and looked behind me.
...There was nobody there.
I didn't see anything. ...There was no way I could.
But.
But...
Why...?
Why am I certain I've been feeling "something" there for a while now...?!
"Haah... haah...!"
My heart was violently beating again, slamming hard against my chest from the inside.
I could barely breathe. Almost like I was being strangled and my trachea was getting crushed.
...Despite that, I mustered my willpower and walked down the hallway, reinvigorating my fading senses... Finally, I reached the stairs.
And slowly, placing careful pressure into the soles of my feet, I made my way downstairs one step at a time.
Tap.
Tap... tap.@k@|@y ...Pat.
Tap... tap... tap.@k@|@y ...Pat... pat... pat.
That's strange.
That's really strange.
Why do I hear another set of footsteps... after my own?
There shouldn't be... anyone on the second floor right now.
Mom should be making breakfast while Dad watches the morning news in the living room at this hour.
And of course, Grandma never takes the stairs, so she must be on the first floor...
Tap.@k@|@y ...Pat.
Tap... tap.@k@|@y ...Pat... pat.
Then... what are these footsteps? Whose footsteps are they?
Also... those... footsteps!
They make a squeaky, sticky sound like they're stepping on chewing gum, and they're following behind me... What are they?!
And... and then!
Who is this presence... looming right behind me?!
...That's right.
This feeling, this presence... Yes, I know this!
Those footsteps... aren't mine.
It's her, the one who was laughing at me through the mirror last night...!
She's following me from behind, constantly trying to ridicule me!
Her appearance... looked very similar to mine.
But her aura was completely different!
After all, she constantly had that horrifyingly cold and cruel look in her eyes!
And... and!
Her whole body was covered in bright red blood that was dripping down to the floor even now, as she made squeaky sticky sounding footprints...!!
Tap.@k@|@y ...Pat.
The fear felt like it was crushing my entire body. Unable to handle the anxiety, I... stopped in place with only a few steps left to go.
It was right behind me, following me.
It remained silent... but I still sensed it behind me, holding its faint breath.
(No good... No good...!)
...I'm dreaming.
The "me" I think I just saw was only a dream.
Over and over again.
Over and over and over and over and over and over and over and over and over.
In my head, I was repeatedly trying to spin together words denying the situation, doing my best to shake off the scene that was burned into my memory.
But... my voice wouldn't come out.
Only a painfully dry wind-like noise came out, like my throat was burning.
A shiver ran down my spine... The cold sweat that ought to have run out once again oozed out and slid down my cold skin.
The backs of my ears were burning hot.
Then, just beside my neck, I felt the air move in a way that couldn't be the wind...!
...Pat.
I definitely heard that footstep... The presence approaching me from behind... went silent... and stopped again.
I couldn't bear the fear crushing my heart, so I squeezed out the last dregs of my courage and looked back.
Why?
Why?
There has to be someone there.
And yet I can't see anything.
Nobody is there.
So why?!
...It can't be.
It can't be, it can't be, it can't be, it can't be, it can't be, it can't be, it can't be, it can't be...!!
Even though I thought "she" was behind me... there was actually nobody behind me, or in front of me either...?
So... what are these footsteps lingering in my ears?
What is this burning presence I've been sensing behind my back for a while now?
...In other words, it's me.
A part of me...?!
"...That's right.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1032. Didn't I tell you that right from the start?"
That moment, a "voice" erupted from my mouth, and I quickly held my throat.
What...? What was that voice just now?! That's not me, that's not me!
"Hehe... what are you saying, Natsumi?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1034. This is your "voice," isn't it?"
(...Th-that's not true!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1473. That's not me talking!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1474. You're...!!)
"Taking over your body? Is that what you wanted to say?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1036. ...Hehe, wrong.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1037. I've been inside you all this time, part of yourself...!"

"Hehe... it was hilarious to watch, you know?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1039. Seeing you desperately struggling, suffering, and being overwhelmed in the end...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1040. You were trying so hard to improve your situation and be happy."
"...I was watching the whole time.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1042. And laughing my ass off as it happened... Ahahahahaha, ahahahahahaha!!"
"Hey, Natsumi.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1044. Stop this already.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1045. Even if you try your hardest, even if you endure, it'll amount to nothing in the end."
"You've tried all sorts of things to improve the situation, but nobody sees it.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1047. Nobody notices.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1048. Nobody understands..."
(Sh-shut up!!)
"It's pointless to deny it, you know?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1050. Because the fact that I was able to emerge so quickly is proof of that."

"Your oblivious parents don't accept you.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1052. Things have been going poorly with your friends recently.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1053. And with all this studying you're still not used to, your fatigue's about to hit its limit..."
"You did your best, Natsumi.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1055. ...But with all that hardship tormenting you, the cage trapping me weakened, and got smaller and smaller."
"The dark emotions that have been piling up all this time have been swelling out of control, and they're just about to burst.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1057. ...Did you not notice?"

"The more effort you put in, the more your heart grows tired.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1059. The stress accumulates.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1060. And the amount of medicine necessary to suppress it increases."

"...Didn't you notice?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1062. The amount of medicine you've been taking is two or three times as much as it was before you moved here... No, maybe even more than that...?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1063. Even though you were warned not to take too much... Hehe!"
(Uu... uwaaaaah...!!)
"In the end, you didn't accomplish anything.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1065. That's right, it was compleeetely useless!"

"Ahahahahahaha!!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1067. Now you'll hand everything you are over to me, and then disappear!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1068. Without a trace. Right...? Ahahahahahahaha, aaahahahahahaha!!"
(N...no!@k@-@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1482. Noooooo!!)
"Now... go to sleep.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_Bnatsu1070. It'll make it easier on you. Sweet dreams. Leave the rest to me..."
My body leaned forward as if repelled... As a result, I missed a step, slipped, and fell.
"Kyaaaa!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1485. ...Oww!!"
Fortunately, I wasn't too high up and the futon I was carrying cushioned my landing, so I reached the first floor with light bumps on the knees.
Then I timidly looked up toward the second floor... and saw nothing there.
I gave my body a quick once over... then heaved a sigh of relief.
What the heck... "Taking over" someone's body? That's not a thing at all.
I bitterly laughed in astonishment at my cowardice as I picked up the dropped futon, opened the sliding door leading to the living room, and stepped inside...
"...G...gyaaaaaaaahhh!!!"
Ehe, ehehehehehehehehe.
Ahahahahahahahaha, ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!!
"Huh?@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1196. So, Natsu... Kimiyoshi is out today?"
"...Come on Akira, you don't have to worry about that stuff around me.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1274. You can use whatever name you're comfortable with."
"I-it's not like I... Huh?"
Akira struggled to come up with a reply... but he suddenly noticed something seemed off and tilted his head.

...There was something odd about Chisato. Even though this was normally the time when she'd say something like "Getting steamy, loverboy?" to tease him... somehow, her face looked like she had something on her mind.
And... speaking of odd things, Chisato came to the art room alone today.
Tamako was always by her side at times like these, even when it was just a mundane errand...
"What's wrong, Chisa?"
"Ah, well... it's no big deal.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1276. There's something I thought maybe you ought to know."
Her evasive manner of speaking was making Akira more and more suspicious.
Still not sure what she meant, he was about to speak up, but that moment.
"Akira... you're planning to go to Hinamizawa, right?"
"Huh?@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1201. Y-yeah... why?"
Akira was about to ask "how do you know about that?" but stopped himself.
It seemed reasonable to think she found out about it while talking with Natsumi.
...But the truth is, she didn't hear it from Natsumi. She found out yesterday when she went to see her, and happened to overhear her talking.
However, she would have felt awkward explaining that, so she continued talking without correcting Akira.
"I was feeling really conflicted about it because I thought I'd be badmouthing her.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1279. ...But, Mamoru-senpai said I ought to let you know."
"Just tell me already, what is it...?"
"Hinamizawa... is apparently a pretty dangerous place.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1281. Especially around this time of year... in June."
Chisato learned about it when she went out for a meal with Mamoru Yamashina, the son of her father's chauffer who she had grown close to due to a variety of circumstances.
The two of them had talked about going to Angel Mort since it was rumored to have exceptionally delicious sweets, so they went to see for themselves what their colorful cakes tasted like...
While teasing Mamoru who was busy paying at the register, Chisato was browsing the souvenir selection in the take-out corner of the store, but her eyes suddenly stopped.
She noticed a tourist brochure on the rack, with the title "Beautiful Nature-filled Village, Hinamizawa" written on the cover.
"Wow... what a lovely village.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1284. Wouldn't it be nice to go to such a rustic natural location from time to time?"
"Hmm?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_mamoru1001_1. Well, I suppose.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_mamoru1002. It's a straight shot down the highway from Kakiuchi, and there's a bus you can take to get there easily, right?"
"...You're so dense. Learn to take a hint.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1286. Mamoru-senpai, I was offering you an invitation, you know?"
"Yeah, I realized.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_mamoru1004. I just wanted to hear you say it properly."
"...Seriously, you're such a jerk.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1288. Even though I agreed to start dating, maybe it would be better to take it back?"
"Ahahaha, if that happens I'll just have to win you over again.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_mamoru1006. ...For the record, I'm not the sort of man who gives up easily."
"Yeah, I'm fully aware.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1290. Geez..."
Chisato realized she was the one being led around by the nose, so she let out a snort while cursing him.
...A few days after Akira confessed to Natsumi, Chisato was suddenly called by Mamoru and he suggested they start going out.
(Probably Tamako's handiwork.@k@-@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1292. ...Geez, that's going way too far.)
She cursed Tamako in her head, while bluffing to herself that maybe it would be a decent way to pass the time... so she reluctantly said okay.
But the trouble was, Chisato still had slightly different feelings in her heart...
"After all, compatibility is crucial, isn't it?@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1294. ...Talking to you like this, Mamoru-senpai, makes that especially clear."
"Is that so?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_mamoru1008. I, personally, think we're a perfect match for one another."
"Oh, come on, that's not what I meant!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1296. ...I was saying things seem to be going well between Akira and Natsumi. Meanwhile I'm too noisy..."

"So self-deprecating.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_mamoru1010. I, on the other hand, am no good at dealing with docile girls.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_mamoru1011. My life wouldn't be interesting at all without someone as sassy as you."
"Then maybe you should compliment me a little more at times like these.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1298. Ahaha..."
Contrary to Chisato's words, a warm sensation was spreading through her chest... full of happiness.
As the hospital director's daughter, she had heard more than her fair share of flowery words up until now. So whenever she received praise, she ended up leaning away from it.
And since he recognized that, he intentionally approached her with a rough manner of speaking. ...So she was very grateful for Mamoru's consideration.
"...Oh?@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1300. Mamoru-senpai, check this out."
"What is it?"
"There's a village festival in Hinamizawa at the end of this month.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1302. It's called "Watanagashi"... Doesn't that sound nice? Wanna go?"
"Watanagashi...?"
The smile disappeared from Mamoru's face the moment he heard that word.
Then he semi-forcefully snatched the brochure away and stared at the contents written there... then gently tapped Chisato on the shoulder and encouraged her to leave.
"Huh?@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1304. Wh-what's wrong?@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1305. Hold on?"
"...@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_mamoru1015.It's not something to talk about inside.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_mamoru1016. Some of the employees here might be from Hinamizawa."
"...What's that supposed to mean?"
"Not that long ago... I heard a rumor about Watanagashi that caught my attention.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_mamoru1018. Villagers have apparently died and gone missing on the day of the festival."

"Mamoru-senpai is aspiring to be a journalist,@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1309. so he has some acquaintances that happen to be freelance reporters.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1310. ...And, according to those contacts, every year on the night of Watanagashi... incidents are happening where people die."
Those horrifying words made Akira catch his breath.
People are dying...?
It sounded like something from the news or a TV drama. The two of them had never encountered anything like that outside of newspapers or magazines.
And this is happening... in a village just a few hours drive away...!
That alone was a shocking revelation. But what's more...
"Akira.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1312. I'm sure I told you once before... that Natsumi is related to the mayor of Hinamizawa?"
...I can hear it.
Chisato-chan and Akira-kun are talking about me.
And the word "Hinamizawa"... was definitely in there.
"Hehe, ehehehe..."
Ah, so it's come out then... The curse of Hinamizawa.
And that I share the same blood as the people of that village...
Who did they hear it from?
How did they find out?
...Well, it's fine. I'll just have to force the answers out of them later.
"B-but!@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1208. Natsumi lived in Okinomiya, the town next to Hinamizawa, right?@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1209. Then it has no direct connection to her!"
"...If that's the case, Akira,@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1314. then why would Natsumi try to keep it secret from you?"
"What if... Natsumi is trying to sacrifice you to the curse?@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1316. She was planning to guide you around the festival, and on the night of Watanagashi..."

"Do you know the story?@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1318. They say Watanagashi is about sending cotton from futons or kimonos adrift... but the name actually refers to intestines.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1319. In other words, it's a ritual of sending organs drifting.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1320. Human organs, obviously..."
Why...?
Chisato-chan, why are you trying to scare Akira-kun by saying these things?
Are you implying that I'm that frightening, too?
Aah, I see.
I finally understand. Chisato-chan, you're saying this... because you want to tear Akira-kun and I apart, is that it?
Ahahahahaha... I get it. The truth is, Chisato-chan likes Akira-kun too.
But the only one pretending not to know... is me.
And that's because if we competed in a fair fight... I'd have no chance of winning, right?
I'm not as smart or as rich as Chisato-chan.
And above all, I'm not a childhood friend of Akira-kun, so I can't possibly know him as well as she does.
In which case... Chisato-chan was planning to win this game from the beginning.
Even without saying anything, she could tell from my behavior that I liked Akira-kun.
Even as she lovingly directed things... Chisato-chan was only pretending to care or want to support me.
Is that why I didn't talk to her about it? ...Because if I told her, she might turn around and say the same thing?
That she liked Akira-kun too...
"Ehe... ehehehehehe...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1492. Ahahahaha...."
Unfair? Filthy?
Yes, that's exactly it. ...But, what about what Chisato-chan is doing with Akira-kun right now?
Is it clean?
Is it fair?
It's not, right?
It's unfair, right?
It's filthy, right?
In which case... it's fine for me to do the same, right?
If you get to act unfair and filthy, then it's fair for me to do the same to you, isn't iiit?!
"......Akira-kun."
"N-Natsumi?!"
Akira-kun and her opened their eyes wide as they stared back at me by the entrance to the art room.
Ahahahaha... really feels like you were trying to keep secrets from me.
You can't do that, Chisato-chan.
Only I can do that with Akira-kun.
So, go away.
Get out of here.
...Hurry up already.
This is my place.
You think I'd give this up to yoooou!?!
"...Hey, Chisato-chan.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1495. Why?"
"Why were you talking to Akira-kun about something like that...?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1497. Well? Why?"
"N-Natsumi... w-well..."
"...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1499.So that's how it is.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1500. Ahahahahahahaha.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1501. ...In the end, Chisato-chan, you are my enemy..."
"Th-that's not...!"
"Liar!!!"
...I won't be fooled.
You can't deceive me any longer.
I won't believe anything you have to say.
I don't even intend to listen to your excuses.
How could you betray me?
You deceived me! How dare you...? How dare you?!
That moment.
Off in the corner of my field of view, I noticed a brightly shining painting knife sitting beside Akira-kun's paintbrush.
Aah, yes... so beautiful.
Looks really sturdy.
It looks light, and sharp.
If I stabbed someone with that, I bet it'd go in nice and deep...
Yes, but more than that, it seems perfect for tearing out someone's throat.
I'm sure a bright red fountain of blood would come vigorously spurting out.
If I stabbed with that... If I slashed with it...
...It was painful.
My vision was spinning.
My consciousness was growing murky, and I was gradually losing myself.
...Tch, are you still getting in the way?
Hurry up and go away. Disappear!!
"N-Natsumi?!"
She desperately rushed over to check on me as I crouched down on the spot.
No, don't come any closer...!
Yes, come...!
I'll do something terrible to Chisato-chan if she comes any closer...!!
As soon as Chisato comes closer, I'll tear out her throat...!!

"G-got it!!"
Chisato-chan anxiously looked on as Akira-kun leapt out of the art room...
With that nuisance Akira out of the way, that idiot Chisato will bring her throat right up next to me...
Chisato is my precious friend...
Chisato is an obstacle that robs me of my happiness...
Please! Run away, Chisato-chan!
Come closer already! I'll kill you, Chisato!!
"Noooooooo!!!"
"In that case... I'll go with you.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1332. I'll go... to hell and back, together with you."
"Absolutely, we're friends. ...These feelings inside my heart are completely genuine."
"Even though it's probably not good to actually beat each other up.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1335. Right now... I can say proudly, from the bottom of my heart, that you're my friend, Natsumi."
"Ch-Chisato-chan...!"

In that case, there's no need for you to shoulder everything on your own.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1339. We can do it together.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1340. ...Yeah. That's it, Natsumi.
You won't have to despair alone.
I failed just as much as you before this. If this is how it ends... I'll be completely satisfied.
So... you don't have to keep blaming yourself.
If you want to reduce yourself to zero... I'll go with you.
And if I see you again next time... I'll be able to do things properly...
...With every fiber of my being...
I focused all my remaining strength... and thrust out both my hands to push Chisato-chan away as she came near me.
"N-Natsu...mi?"
"Haah, haah, haah...!!"
Chisato-chan was laying on the floor, staring at me in bewilderment like she didn't know what just happened.
...Was she angry?
Did she think I was a terrible person?
...I'm sorry, Chisato-chan.
I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry.
But, I wanted to save Chisato-chan.
I absolutely don't want to end up killing her with my own two hands...
Want to kill, want to kill, want to kiiiiiiiill.
I want to kill, I want to kill, I want to kill, I want to kill, I want to kiiiiiiiiiiill!!
"N-Natsumi?!"
"N...no...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1520. I-I'm disappearing...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1521. I-I'm being forced out...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1522. No... No, no... Noooooooo!!!"
My whole body was burning up.
It was painful to breathe.
If things stay like this, again... again I'll...!
"Wh-where are you going, Natsumi?!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1344. Hold on?!"
"Haah, haah, haah...!!"
I'm not sure how... I'm not sure what way I went to get here.
I just desperately ran away from the school to get away from Chisato-chan, and kept running, and running, and running.

"Ngh, ahhh...!!"
...My chest ached like it was burning.
It hurts, it hurts, it hurts it hurts it hurts it hurts it hurts.
(R-right... the medicine...!)
At times like these, taking the medicine will make me feel a little better...!
I slipped my quivering hand into my pouch, then rooted around inside and roughly grabbed the pill case.
Then I opened the lid and pushed really hard to pop it out of the package, but I applied too much force and it slipped out of my hand, falling to the ground.
"Haah, haah, haah...!!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1528. U-uuu... uwaaaaaahh!!!"
